options.content:
# Top N Hot Files
Identify the most accessed files by total operations. Filter by protocol, user, and folder path prefix.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT count(*)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT path.path AS "File Path",
       COUNT(*) AS "Total Ops",
       COUNT(DISTINCT rpc_type) AS "Op Types",
       COUNT(DISTINCT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))) AS "Unique Users",
       COUNT(DISTINCT protocol) AS "Protocols",
       COALESCE(SUM(num_bytes), 0) AS "Total Bytes",
       ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT rpc_type), ', ') AS "Operations",
       ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT protocol), ', ') AS "Via Protocols"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
  AND rpc_type NOT IN ('READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'MKDIR', 'RMDIR')
GROUP BY path.path
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT ${topN}

WITH hot_files AS (
  SELECT path.path AS fp
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
    AND login_name <> 'audit'
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
    AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
    AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
    AND rpc_type NOT IN ('READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'MKDIR', 'RMDIR')
  GROUP BY path.path
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT ${topN}
)
SELECT a.rpc_type AS rpc_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table a
JOIN hot_files h ON a.path.path = h.fp
WHERE a.time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND a.time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY a.rpc_type
ORDER BY count DESC

WITH hot_files AS (
  SELECT path.path AS fp
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
    AND login_name <> 'audit'
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
    AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
    AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
    AND rpc_type NOT IN ('READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'MKDIR', 'RMDIR')
  GROUP BY path.path
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT ${topN}
)
SELECT a.protocol, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table a
JOIN hot_files h ON a.path.path = h.fp
WHERE a.time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND a.time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY a.protocol
ORDER BY count DESC

WITH hot_files AS (
  SELECT path.path AS fp
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
    AND login_name <> 'audit'
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
    AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
    AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
    AND rpc_type NOT IN ('READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'MKDIR', 'RMDIR')
  GROUP BY path.path
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT ${topN}
)
SELECT IF(a.login_name!='', a.login_name, 'uid'||cast(a.uid as VARCHAR)) AS user,
       COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table a
JOIN hot_files h ON a.path.path = h.fp
WHERE a.time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND a.time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY IF(a.login_name!='', a.login_name, 'uid'||cast(a.uid as VARCHAR))
ORDER BY count DESC

list.description: Number of top files to display
list.label: Top N
list.name: topN

list.description: Filter by user login name prefix
list.label: User Prefix
list.name: user_prefix

title: VAST Audit Log — Top N Hot Files
